name: Builders & LBPs
description: Licensed Building Practitioners for new builds, renovations, extensions, and structural work.
licensing: LBP (Licensed Building Practitioner) licence required for restricted building work on homes and small buildings.
avg_cost_nz: $80–$120/hr for labour, or fixed-price contracts for new builds
what_to_look_for: Valid LBP licence (check the public register)
Public liability insurance (ask for a certificate)
References from recent similar jobs
Building consent experience
Clear written quote with inclusions and exclusions

name: Plumbers & Gasfitters
description: Licensed plumbers and gasfitters for water supply, drainage, hot water, and gas fitting work.
licensing: Must be registered and licensed under the Plumbers, Gasfitters and Drainlayers Act 2006. Check the PGD Board register.
what_to_look_for: Current registration with the PGD Board
Licensed for the specific work type (plumbing, gasfitting, or drainlaying)
Public liability insurance
Responds promptly to urgent callouts
Upfront pricing or clear hourly rate
red_flags: Quotes suspiciously low for gas work

name: Electricians
description: Registered electrical workers for wiring, switchboards, heat pumps, EV chargers, and all electrical installations.
licensing: Must be a Registered Electrical Worker (REW) under the Electricity Act 1992. All electrical work must be certified.
what_to_look_for: Registered Electrical Worker (REW) licence
Issues an Electrical Certificate of Compliance (CoC) after work
Public liability insurance
Familiar with NZ electrical standards (AS/NZS 3000)
Experience with your specific job type (domestic, commercial, heat pumps)
red_flags: Doesn't mention a Certificate of Compliance
Quotes for work without seeing the site

name: Painters & Decorators
description: Professional painters for interior and exterior residential and commercial painting, wallpapering, and decorating.
licensing: No mandatory licensing in NZ, but look for members of the Painting and Decorating Association NZ (PDANZ).
what_to_look_for: PDANZ membership (voluntary but signals quality)
Public liability insurance
References and photos of recent work
Detailed quote specifying paint brand, number of coats, preparation work
Experience with your surface type (weatherboard, plaster, etc.)
red_flags: Won't specify paint brand or quality
